title: CHAOTIC ENGINEERING PROGRAM -- Smutzige Hansi Remix

scenes.prompt: Explosive opening. Black screen, then massive explosion overlay. Title text slams in: CHAOTIC ENGINEERING PROGRAM. Subtitle: Eine Smutzige Hansi Produktion. Fire particles, screen shake, impact sound.
scenes.subtitle: CHAOTIC ENGINEERING PROGRAM

scenes.prompt: Smutzige Hansi appears. Reference footage from data/. Dramatic entrance, slow-motion effect, lens flare.
scenes.subtitle: Ich gehe bald...

scenes.prompt: Meme-cat chaotic coding energy. Smutzige Hansi typing aggressively at a laptop. Overdramatic zooms. Terminal text flying across screen. Schlange keywords visible: importiert, probiert, gibzurueck. Explosion overlays. Fast cuts. Matrix rain of German keywords.
scenes.subtitle: PROBIERT * AUSSER * ENDLICH

scenes.prompt: Screen shows Schlange code transforming into Python. Split screen: German keywords on left, Python on right. verkuendet becomes print. defn becomes def. Dramatic reveal: SCHLANGE -- Python auf Deutsch.
scenes.subtitle: SCHLANGE -- Python auf Deutsch

scenes.prompt: Spotify playlist Tom 2000 appears on screen. 2000 tracks scroll past dramatically. Play counts and hours displayed. Music visualization in background.
scenes.subtitle: TOM 2000 -- 2000 Tracks. 5706 Stunden.

scenes.prompt: Giant inflatable beer cow appears on screen. Dramatic zoom. Confetti explosion. Beer taps attached to cow udders. Everyone looks shocked and delighted.
scenes.subtitle: Die KI hat entschieden...

scenes.prompt: Clean event card with bold typography. Date: Donnerstag, 12. Maerz 2026. Location: De Vierkant. Hazard stripes border. Countdown timer effect.
scenes.subtitle: Donnerstag, 12. Maerz 2026 -- De Vierkant

scenes.prompt: Final explosion. Smutzige Hansi walks away from the camera. Text appears: Sei dabei -- oder sei ein Viereck. Powered by Schlange logo. Fade to black.
scenes.subtitle: Sei dabei -- oder sei ein Viereck.
